check_content_excerpt:
Verify the macOS system is configured to ensure secure boot level set to full using the following command:

/usr/libexec/mdmclient QuerySecurityInfo | /usr/bin/grep -c "SecureBootLevel = full"

If the result is not "1", this is a finding.
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the macOS system to ensure secure boot level set to full by booting into Recovery Mode and enable Full Secure Boot.
title: The macOS system must ensure secure boot level set to full.
